title: lappula anoplocarpa
intro: Lappula anoplocarpa, also known as the glandular lappula, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lappula anoplocarpa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, Lappula anoplocarpa is often used in tinctures, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
